mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet (name, category_id, breed, age, gender, color, size, description, image, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{breed}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{color}, #{size}, #{description}, #{image}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS category_name, COUNT(p.id) AS count FROM pet_category c LEFT JOIN pet p ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY count DESC
